reasoning.typography: Letter-spaced uppercase wordmark with refined serifs for body text — shows discipline, though not wildly characterful
reasoning.hierarchy: Single dominant element (wordmark), clean visual silence, though minimal hierarchy to test since there's almost no content
reasoning.distinctiveness: Absolutely distinctive — dark blue void, centered minimal contact info, no marketing speak. Could not swap for another fund
reasoning.color: Monochromatic dark blue/light blue — extreme restraint, zero decoration, accent used sparingly for links
reasoning.density: Confident emptiness with tiny centered content block — anti-density as statement, not timidity
reasoning.voice: Radical departure from fund stencil — no 'portfolio', no 'team', no 'thesis'. Pure confidence through silence

winning_patterns: Emptiness as power move — the vast dark blue field communicates confidence
Anti-marketing stance — just addresses and a Twitter link, no persuasion
Centered minimal vcard pattern — old-school business card formality
Monochromatic color discipline — single blue, no gradients or decoration
Letter-spaced uppercase logo treatment — architectural restraint
anti_patterns: Border around logo feels slightly decorative/unnecessary
Copyright year script slightly precious for such a minimal site
Link underline treatment inconsistent (some links styled differently)
Could argue the emptiness is style over substance — no actual information provided
